purpose: Verify TASK-13 re-fix (session search filter), verify TASK-17/20/21/22, check for regressions, discover new issues

verified_fixes.description: Session search/filter in sidebar History tab
verified_fixes.evidence: Search input in History sidebar now correctly filters session list. Tested three scenarios: (1) Typing 'drift' filtered 20+ sessions down to exactly 2 matching entries. (2) Typing 'ShipLoop' filtered to 2 results (one named 'ShipLoop' and one 'drift' session containing 'shiploop' in prompt text -- search is case-insensitive and searches name+content). (3) Typing 'xyznonexistent' showed 'No matching sessions' empty state. Clear button removes filter and restores all sessions. Date grouping headers (TODAY, YESTERDAY) preserved in filtered results.

Settings > General > Notifications section shows prominent warning: 'Stored in this browser only. Settings will not sync across devices or browsers.' This is visible directly below the section heading and above all toggle switches. Each notification type also has a descriptive subtitle explaining what it does.

Settings > Automations shows PMO Scheduler section with explanatory text: 'Periodic project health scans. The PMO agent reviews code quality, test coverage, and open issues on a schedule.' Users now understand what PMO means and what scans do.

Settings has dedicated 'Automations' section with description 'Sprint protocol, PMO scans, scheduled tasks'. Contains PMO Scheduler with start/run controls and an Automations sub-section with 'Add' button, 'Suggestions' button, and a text input 'Describe an automation...' with 'Generate' button. Empty state message: 'No automations configured. Click "Add" to create one.'

unable_to_verify.reason: No cost display visible without active sessions generating API spend.
No running processes. Running section shows 'No running sessions'.
unable_to_verify.recommendation: Conditionally verified -- requires running Claude processes

unable_to_verify.reason: No Limits link visible without active sessions.

unable_to_verify.description: No duplicate duration in Running on Machine

re_verified_previous_fixes.evidence: All 5 tabs visible: Sessions, Teams, Sprints, Memory, Settings.
History sidebar shows meaningful names: 'studio', 'InPipeline', 'pmo -- InPipeline', 'drift', 'ShipLoop', 'AgentStudio'.
Re-run Setup Wizard available in Settings > Projects.

re_verified_previous_fixes.description: Memory tab with browse, search, filter
re_verified_previous_fixes.evidence: Memory tab shows 95 memories with category filters (Learnings 47, Corrections 23, Decisions 20, Human Inputs 2, Knowledge 3, Pinned 0), tag filters (dso-portal, auth, security, qa, etc.), search, and New button.
Each session in History sidebar has 'Rename session' button.

Tested on pmo-old-ticket-check room. Confirmation shows: 'Close room? This will close pmo-old-ticket-check and its agent sessions. Chat history is preserved.' with 'Keep open' and 'Close room' buttons.
No empty WORKFLOWS section visible. Automations section in Settings replaces it.
Each notification toggle has text label and descriptive subtitle (e.g., 'Sprint gate approvals' / 'When a sprint phase needs your sign-off').
Checked Teams, Sprints, Memory, Settings. No 'New Session' button or session empty state appears on non-Sessions tabs.
Toggle switches in Settings > Notifications use amber coloring.
Sprint detail view shows both 'Resume' and 'Cancel' buttons for paused sprint.

existing_issues_still_present.description: Sessions empty state appears below Dev Servers table in Servers sub-tab
existing_issues_still_present.evidence: The 'Ready to go.' text and 'New Session' button still appear below the Dev Servers table when viewing the Servers sub-tab.

sections_tested: Sessions (landing, empty state, history, sidebar search with 3 test queries, servers sub-tab, process visibility)
Teams (room list active/archived, room chat view, close room confirmation dialog, agents sub-tab, new room button)
Sprints (active sprint detail, completed sprints, resume/cancel buttons, activity log, overview, gates, agents list)
Memory (95 items loaded, category filters with counts, tag filters, search, New/Edit/Delete actions, Pinned section)

Settings (General with model/permissions/directory, Notifications with 5 toggles + labels, Projects/Workspace, Agents list, Dev Servers/System Monitor, Automations with PMO Scheduler, Shortcuts table, About info)
Sidebar (Sessions, History with search filter, Servers, Dev Servers)
Design Identity (dark theme, amber accent, compact spacing, monospace, no emoji, no exclamation marks, voice/tone)
Cross-cutting (tab navigation, no bleed-through, confirmation dialogs, empty states)

fix_verification.note: TASK-22 unable to verify (requires running processes) but was not a primary target

design_identity_compliance.dark_theme: PASS - Consistently dark across all sections. No white or light backgrounds.
design_identity_compliance.amber_accent: PASS - Amber for active tabs, sprint progress, action buttons, toggles. No inappropriate colors.
design_identity_compliance.green_semantic: PASS - Green only for success states (passed gates, active servers).
design_identity_compliance.no_emoji: PASS - No emoji found in UI text.
design_identity_compliance.no_exclamation: PASS - No exclamation marks in UI text.
design_identity_compliance.empty_states: PASS - Matter-of-fact: 'Ready to go.', 'No running sessions', 'No matching sessions', 'No automations configured.'
design_identity_compliance.voice_consistency: PASS - Consistent tab labels: Sessions, Teams, Sprints, Memory, Settings. Short, direct text.
design_identity_compliance.monospace_font: PARTIAL - System monospace (SF Mono) used throughout. Geist Mono specified in IDENTITY.md but not applied. Visually consistent but not per spec.
design_identity_compliance.section_headers: PASS - Uppercase: RUNNING, ACTIVE, COMPLETED, ARCHIVED, SETTINGS, MEMORY, SPRINTS, TODAY, YESTERDAY.
design_identity_compliance.icons_16px: PASS - All icons appear correctly sized.

summary: All 4 primary fixes verified: TASK-13 (session search filter -- now working correctly with case-insensitive name+content matching, date grouping preserved, clear button works, empty state shows 'No matching sessions'), TASK-17 (notification persistence warning prominent), TASK-20 (PMO explanation text added), TASK-21 (Automations section with PMO Scheduler and custom automation builder). TASK-22 unable to verify (requires running processes). Zero failed verifications. Zero regressions. Zero new issues found. 12 previously verified fixes re-confirmed still working. App health is strong across all sections. TASK-45 (sessions empty state below servers) remains as LOW pending issue.
